meta.title: Focus Areas
meta.description: Explore AICTiG's research and policy focus areas in cybersecurity and ICT governance

hero.title: Our Focus Areas
hero.subtitle: AICTiG adopts a multidisciplinary approach to produce policy-oriented research across key areas of cybersecurity and ICT governance in Africa.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: Governance frameworks and policy development for AI systems in Africa

autonomousWeapons.description: Legal and ethical frameworks for autonomous weapons systems

broadband.description: Broadband infrastructure development and universal access policies

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity & Cybercrime
cybersecurity.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity policies and cybercrime legislation

criticalInfrastructure.title: Critical Infrastructure Protection
criticalInfrastructure.description: Protection frameworks for critical national infrastructure

cyberwarfare.title: Cyberwarfare
cyberwarfare.description: National cyber defense strategies and international cyber norms

crypto.title: Cryptocurrencies
crypto.description: Regulation and governance of digital currencies and blockchain

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: Privacy laws and data protection frameworks

digitalSovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
digitalSovereignty.description: National sovereignty in cyberspace and data localization

digitalIdentity.title: Digital Identity
digitalIdentity.description: Digital identity systems and authentication frameworks

digitalTrade.title: Digital Trade
digitalTrade.description: Cross-border e-commerce and digital trade agreements

electronicEvidence.title: Electronic Evidence
electronicEvidence.description: Legal frameworks for electronic evidence in judicial proceedings

digitalTaxation.title: Taxation of Digital Services
digitalTaxation.description: Tax policies for digital economy and online services

techRights.title: Technology & Human Rights
techRights.description: Digital rights, freedom of expression, and privacy

ict4d.title: ICT for Development (ICT4D)

meta.title: Consultancy Services
meta.description: Professional consultancy services in cybersecurity policy, ICT law, and regulatory compliance

hero.title: Consultancy Services
hero.subtitle: AICTiG provides expert consultancy services to governments, international organizations, and private sector entities across Africa and beyond.

overview.title: Our Services
overview.description: We offer expert consultancy services in the governance of cybersecurity and ICTs.

policyDevelopment.title: Policy Development & Analysis
policyDevelopment.description: Expert assistance in developing and analyzing ICT and cybersecurity policy frameworks.
policyDevelopment.feature1: National cybersecurity policy and strategy development

legalAnalysis.title: Legal Analysis
legalAnalysis.description: Expert analysis of national, regional and international cybersecurity and ICT legislations.

legalDrafting.title: Legal Drafting
legalDrafting.description: Drafting of cybersecurity and ICT legislations, regulations, and legal instruments.

regulatoryCompliance.title: Regulatory Compliance & Monitoring
regulatoryCompliance.description: Support for regulatory compliance and monitoring the implementation of ICT and cybersecurity regulations.

dataProtectionTraining.title: Data Protection Compliance Training
dataProtectionTraining.description: Specialized compliance training programs on national, regional and international data protection laws.

mappingStudies.title: Mapping Studies
mappingStudies.description: Comprehensive mapping of ICT and cybersecurity landscapes across countries and regions.

awarenessTraining.title: Legal & Policy Awareness Training
awarenessTraining.description: Capacity building programs to facilitate stakeholder awareness of policy and regulatory developments.

electronicEvidence.title: Electronic Evidence Management
electronicEvidence.description: Training and consultancy on handling, preserving, and presenting electronic evidence.

breachManagement.title: Data Breach Management & Risk Mitigation
breachManagement.description: Strategic guidance on data breach response, incident management, and risk mitigation.

expertise.title: Deep Expertise
expertise.description: Our team combines legal, technical, and policy expertise with extensive experience in African and international contexts.

regional.title: Regional Knowledge
regional.description: In-depth understanding of African national and regional frameworks, challenges, and opportunities in ICT and cybersecurity governance.

evidenceBased.title: Evidence-Based Approach
evidenceBased.description: Our consultancy is grounded in rigorous research and evidence-based policy recommendations.

cta.title: Ready to Work With Us?
cta.description: Contact us today to discuss how we can support your organization's cybersecurity and ICT governance needs.
